headline: U.S.-Iran war 'tax' begins to hit American businesses and consumers
summary: A U.S.-Iran war 'tax' is beginning to hit consumers as diesel and jet fuel prices rise and stress business profitability, and there is no relief in sight.

headline: The Iran War Is Reshaping Global Aviation
summary: (Bloomberg) -- For years, airlines in the US and Europe have gawked at the rise of Middle East carriers funneling ever more passengers through their gleaming hubs in Dubai and Doha at competitive prices with the latest jets.Emirates, Qatar Airways and Etihad Airways offered a viable alternative in the Gulf, leveraging a perfect position between three continents – Europe, Africa and Asia.That dynamic changed almost overnight when the Iran war broke out, shuttering airspaces, grounding planes and
